mission.title: emissary-ingress: Emissary sends gzip encoded payloads to backend services
mission.description: Emissary sends gzip encoded payloads to backend services. This issue affects 10+ users.

steps.title: Identify emissary-ingress troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your emissary-ingress deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n emissary-ingress -l app.kubernetes.io/name=emissary-ingress
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=emissary-ingress -n emissary-ingress --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review emissary-ingress configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant emissary-ingress configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n emissary-ingress -l app.kubernetes.io/name=emissary-ingress
kubectl get configmap -n emissary-ingress -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=emissary-ingress
```
### Describe the bug
If we send certain payloads to Emissary, Emissary seems to be gzip encoding the payload and forwarding it to the upstream service.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Emissary sends gzip encoded payloads to backend services
steps.description:
Fixes a bug introduced in `1.14.0` where upstream services would receive g
```yaml
---
apiVersion: getambassador.io/v2
kind: Module
metadata:
  name: ambassador
  namespace: ambassador
spec:
  ambassador_id: gzip-test
  config:
    gzip:
      enabled: true
    use_remote_address: true
    xff_num_trusted_hops: 1
    server_name: "gzip-test"
[ ... ]
```

steps.title: Confirm Emissary sends gzip encoded payloads to backend… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=emissary-ingress -n emissary-ingress --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n emissary-ingress --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: Fixes a bug introduced in `1.14.0` where upstream services would receive g
codeSnippets:
---
apiVersion: getambassador.io/v2
kind: Module
metadata:
  name: ambassador
  namespace: ambassador
spec:
  ambassador_id: gzip-test
  config:
    gzip:
      enabled: true
    use_remote_address: true
    xff_num_trusted_hops: 1
    server_name: "gzip-test"
[ ... ]

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with emissary-ingress installed or the issue environment reproducible.
